key.name: terminal-command
key.description: Command used to open the project in terminal. %s will be replaced by the project path.

key.name: polling-interval
key.description: Interval in seconds to check for server status.

key.name: show-php-version
key.description: Whether to show the PHP version in the menu.

key.name: favorite-servers
key.description: List of server directory paths marked as favorites.
